$comment: Generated by Phase 1.5 (TODO-02). Maps every PRD FR-NNN to >=1 operationId in openapi.yaml, or marks it non-API with a reason. Source: PRD.md v2.0 Section 9, hld.md.

mappings.title: Accept PDF upload, extract text + structure
Embed chunks + store with section_id/doc_id/page payload
Targeted retrieval filtered to selected section_ids
mappings.note: Surfaced via routeQuery scope and consumed internally by answerQuery; retrieval itself is an internal node (HLD 4.4).

mappings.title: Source citations (section title + page range)
mappings.note: Citation schema with section_title/page_start/page_end on AnswerFinalEvent.

mappings.title: Fallback to full-doc RAG when all confidences low
mappings.note: Exposed via fallback:boolean in RouteResponse and RoutingSummary.

mappings.title: Display routing confidence values
mappings.note: confidence[] arrays in RouteResponse and RoutingSummary.

mappings.title: Why-did-you-look-here explainability panel
mappings.note: rationale string in RouteResponse and RoutingSummary.

mappings.title: Hybrid search (TOC + BM25 + vector)
mappings.reason: Internal retrieval-engine strategy; no distinct endpoint. Influences routeQuery/answerQuery results, not the contract surface.

mappings.title: Query across multiple related documents
mappings.note: Optional document_ids[] on RouteRequest (OAQ-4 fan-out, Phase 2).

mappings.title: Rewrite vague queries before routing
mappings.reason: Internal pre-routing transform on the query; transparent to the API contract (no request/response field change).

mappings.title: Optional Cohere Rerank-3 post-route, per-request toggle
mappings.note: rerank:boolean flag on AnswerRequest (and advisory on RouteRequest).

mappings.title: Scanned/image PDFs via OCR fallback
mappings.note: ocr:boolean flag on IngestRequest (Azure DI, Scenario C).

mappings.title: Stream answers token-by-token via SSE + final event
Capture like/dislike feedback
mappings.reason: Phase 3+ feature (P2). Will get a dedicated feedback endpoint when scheduled; out of the Phase 1.5 MVP contract scope per PRD roadmap.

mappings.title: Token-savings / accuracy / usage dashboard
mappings.reason: Phase 3+ analytics surface (P2); separate metrics/reporting API, not part of the core MVP contract.

mappings.title: Python/JS SDKs + published API docs
mappings.reason: SDKs are generated artifacts/tooling derived FROM this openapi.yaml; not themselves endpoints.

mappings.title: Domain-specific router fine-tuning
mappings.reason: ML training/ops capability (P2, deferred per ADR-1); no runtime API surface.

mappings.title: Multilingual documents via BGE-M3 fallback
mappings.note: Embedding-model fallback selected during ingestion; covered by ingestDocument (NFR-012).

mappings.title: India data-residency configuration
mappings.note: residency_region enum on IngestRequest; surfaced on Document.

mappings.title: Flag PII fields with x-pii in schema + access responses
mappings.note: x-pii:true annotations on PII schema fields and DataAccessExport.pii_fields inventory.

nfr_api_relevant.note: OpenAPI 3.1 + RFC-7807 problem+json across all operations.

non_api_summary.rationale: Internal strategies (FR-013 hybrid search, FR-015 query rewrite) are transparent to the contract; FR-019/020 are Phase 3+ analytics/feedback surfaces deferred per PRD roadmap; FR-021 SDKs are generated from this spec; FR-022 router fine-tuning is an ML-ops capability with no runtime endpoint. All 6 are intentionally out of the Phase 1.5 MVP API surface and tracked here for 100% FR accountability.
